name: Jerk Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 4 Fresh jalapeno peppers, seeded and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse chicken with cold water and pat dry. Cut off and discard the pointed tip of each wing and halve wings at the main joint.
2. In a food processor, combine scallions, jalapeno peppers, vinegar, allspice, garlic, thyme, salt, pepper, and cayenne. Process until well blended. With machine running, slowly pour in oil and puree until a thick paste forms.
3. In a large bowl, combine chicken wings and jerk paste. Toss until wings are well coated. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. Preheat broiler. Arrange wings on broiler pan about 6 inches from heat and broil, turning once, until nicely browned outside and cooked through, about 20 minutes total. Serve warm or at room temperature with lime wedges and lots of napkins.
